title: brachypodium psilanthum
intro: Brachypodium psilanthum, also known as the thorny bristle-grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is traditionally used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Brachypodium psilanthum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
